defaultTagline: Help keep the bot free for everyone
defaultDescription: Decatron is completely free. If you want to support development and server costs, you can do so here. As a thank you, you receive exclusive bot benefits.
whySupportSubtitle: Your support has a direct impact on Decatron and the community
whyServerCostsDesc: Keeping Decatron running 24/7 has real infrastructure costs. Your support covers the servers.
whyNewFeaturesDesc: Every donation accelerates the development of new features. Founders have a voice in the roadmap!
whyFreeForAllDesc: Your support makes it possible for Decatron to be free for the entire streaming community. Thank you.
chooseTierSubtitle: All payments are secure and processed by PayPal
haveDiscountCode: Do you have a discount code?
paypalConnectError: Error connecting to PayPal. Try again.
freePlanNotice: The free plan includes: 25 commands, 5 variants, 1 overlay per type, advanced scripting and more.
freeDonateSubtitle: No tiers or benefits. Just support the project with whatever you want.
foundersEmptySubtitle: Be the first to permanently support Decatron and your name will be here forever.
activeSupportersSubtitle: Thanks to everyone for making Decatron free
beFirstSupporter: Be the first to support the project!
faq0a: No. Decatron is 100% free for all Twitch streamers. Donations are voluntary to support development and cover server costs.
faq1q: What happens if I cancel my monthly subscription?
faq1a: Your tier automatically returns to the free plan when the period expires. No additional charge is made.
faq2a: Yes. All payments are processed through PayPal, which has buyer protection and data encryption.
faq3a: Yes. Once payment is confirmed, benefits are automatically applied to your Decatron account within minutes.
faq4q: Can I switch from monthly to permanent later?
faq4a: Of course. You can upgrade at any time. If you already have an active monthly plan, you can switch to the permanent plan and never need to pay monthly again.
faq5a: You can request a refund within 7 days of payment if the benefits were not activated correctly. Contact us on Discord.
footerCtaSubtitle: Every donation, no matter how small, has a real impact on the project.
footerPaypal: Payments are securely processed by PayPal
comingSoonSubtitle: The supporters page will be available soon.
donationBanner: Your support makes it possible for Decatron to be free for everyone.
tierBannerThanks: Thank you for your support! Tier {{tier}} {{status}}.
tierBenefitsActive: Benefits are now active on your Decatron account.
tierPaymentReceived: Your payment was received. To activate {{tier}} tier benefits, log in with your Decatron account.
paypalCaptureError: There was an error confirming the payment. Contact @decatron on Discord.
donationCaptureError: There was an error confirming the donation. Contact @decatron on Discord.
